items.title: Beta 260710
items.body:
🎉 New Public Beta Version Released! 🎉

▶️ Discord link : https://discord.com/invite/jSTjBKSjvm 

▶️ Patreon : https://www.patreon.com/cw/EnthrallGame 

▶️ SubscribeStar.adult : https://subscribestar.adult/EnthrallGame 

🔄️ | Changes to the chapters for the Landlady.
🔄️ | Fixed the auto-save bug that was not triggering correctly each time the player sleeps.
✅ | Added Coke and Meth drugs to the TrapHouse, along with a light design overhaul of the selling interface.
🔄️ | Changed all images and videos for Landlady to the new actress Ava Addams.
✅ | Added the Gallery in Main Menu. Once you've viewed an image or video, it will remain unlocked in the Gallery regardless of which save you're playing.
✅ | Added chapter 6, with a connection to the mayor character.
🔄️ | Changed title for chapter 3.
✅ | Added the Building location in the financial district, accessible by progressing in the main story, chapter 6.
🔄️ | Renaming files to make the game compatible with Linux.
✅ | Start of chapter 6, accessible early to gain access to the mayor.
✅ | Chapter 4 complete.
✅ | When you are a professor, you now have different actions available in your personal office at the University.
🔄️ | Changes to the chapters for the Principal.
🔄️ | Changes to the chapters for the Classmate 3.
🔄️ | Changes to the chapters for the Classmate 2.
✅ | Added the encyclopedia (button visible between the phone button and the menu button).
🔄️ | Changes to the chapters for the Bestfriend.
🔄️ | Different texts can be read in Classmate April's chapters, for example, which differ in chapter 1 depending on whether you have a car or not, and in chapter 3 depending on whether you have reached chapter 5 with your Bestfriend Amy. (This does not impact the story in any way, it is purely for story consistency, but you will find other adaptive texts with other characters).
🔄️ | Changes to the chapters for the Classmate 1.
🔄️ | Improved game responsiveness.
✅ | Added a description in the tooltips.
✅ | Added the wikiterms system, which automatically underlines text and when the player hovers over it, displays a tooltip with a description, information, etc.
🔄️ | Changes to the chapters for the Female Housemate.
✅ | Added the ability to click on institution names in the Corruption tooltip.

items.title: Beta 260404
items.body:
🎉 New Public Beta Version Released! 🎉

▶️ Discord link : https://discord.com/invite/jSTjBKSjvm 

▶️ Patreon : https://www.patreon.com/cw/EnthrallGame 

▶️ SubscribeStar.adult : https://subscribestar.adult/EnthrallGame 

🔄️ | Improved game responsiveness
✅ | Added emojis to bottom bar buttons
🔄️ | Improved the Pair Match mini-game in the Casino
🔄️ | Fixed various minor bugs
🔄️ | Migration to a new framework for the launcher file
✅ | Added the Toilet location in the Park.
✅ | Added the GloryHole in Toilet, with the possibility for the player to use a Psychic Power orb to give an order to the NPC.
🔄️ | Fixed bugs blocking story progression on certain characters.
✅ | Added an option to change the in-game font size. (This is still being tested, so if there are any bugs or malfunctions, please report them.)
🔄️ | Reduced drug (weed) purchase price ($80 -> $50). Drug (weed) selling less lucrative.
✅ | Added an option exclusively for the .exe version, Window Mode which allows switching between fullscreen, windowed, or maximized windowed.
🔄️ | Moved the meditation mini-game (renamed to Pair Match) to the casino (allows you to earn money)
✅ | Added the Casino location in the RedLight District
🔄️ | Changed some text in the character Stories menu
🔄️ | Improved the work mini-game to make it simpler, and added a tutorial via a button
🔄️ | Improved the drug selling mini-game to make it simpler
✅ | Now when a character has just been corrupted, the player must sleep before corrupting the same character again, preventing the player from corrupting a character all at once in a row.
✅ | Added a system to skip mini-games in the game settings
🔄️ | Bug fix in the drug selling system
❌ | Complete removal of the corruption mini-game system
❌ | Removal of the affection system
🔄️ | Changed how Psychic Power works, via orbs used for corruption interactions that reset each sleep
🔄️ | Changed the combat system, fewer choices, but the Fitness variable now has much more impact during fights
🔄️ | Reduced taxi price from $50 to $10
🔄️ | Reduced the cost of healing from $50 to $25
🔄️ | Improved and added information to the first tutorial when starting a new game
🔄️ | Fixed the word Heal to Health.

items.title: New Patch - v0.B260328
items.body:
Sorry about that, I rushed an update to rework the meditation system mini-game and forgot to include the required files. My apologies again. 

🔄️ | patch mini-game and add img
❌ | Delete anti-cheat

items.title: Alpha 250911
items.body:
🔄️ | Internal interaction page system overhaul.
🔄️ | Affection now reduces corruption difficulty. Higher Affection makes corruption easier.
🔄️ | Talk interactions now grant limited affection per corruption level.
🔄️ | Replacement of the LawsCorruption system with CityCorruption, blocking interactions when the NPC is outside and when the CityCorruption level has not reached a required threshold.
✅ | Several small changes to make the game more enjoyable and less grindy.
✅ | Added the story tracking system.
✅ | Added stripper scenes to the strip club.
🔄️ | Removed the daily limit on meditation usage.
✅ | Added maximum energy increase through the Fitness attribute every 20 points.
🔄️ | Minor bug fixes.
✅ | Added affection gain during sexual interactions.
✅ | Added various small details.
🔄️ | Main menu UI changes.
🔄️ | Updates to several smaller menus.
